zh.lifeSummary: 當John Meade於1550年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊德時，他的父親Reginald Reynold Meade15歲，母親Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland12歲。他和Mary Ursula Meade至少有3個女兒。他去世於1611年10月12日在英國英格蘭艾可享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Meade was born in 1550, in Lydd, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald Reynold Meade, was 15 and his mother, Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland, was 12. He had at least 3 daughters with Mary Ursula Meade. He died on 12 October 1611, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Mary Ursula Meade. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1611, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Meade(이)가 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Reynold Meade(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Mary Ursula Meade(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Meade родился в 1550 г. в местности лидд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald Reynold Meade было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland, 12. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Mary Ursula Meade. Он умер 12 октября 1611 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
